title: Combining Ability for Field Resistance to Disease, Fruit Yield and Yield Factors among Hot Pepper (Capsicum annuum L.) Genotypes in Uganda
abstract: Productivity and Quality of hot Pepper in Uganda are low, mainly due to lack of superior cultivars. As a step towards cultivar improvement  three exotic  and  three local hot pepper genotypes with varying genetic backgrounds  were crossed in a half diallel  to determine the combining ability  of parent and crosses, and the gene effects of important disease, yield and related traits....
